invariants.name: Schema Isolation
invariants.description: All field_monitor objects reside in a dedicated schema, not polluting existing schemas.
invariants.evidence: CREATE SCHEMA field_monitor. All 5 tables, 3 functions, 4 triggers created within field_monitor namespace. No cross-schema DDL. No modifications to existing schemas (cl, lcs, outreach, ctb, doctrine).

invariants.name: CTB Promotion Enforcement — Constitutional Law
invariants.description: field_state.promotion_status is forward-only: DRAFT → PROMOTED. Demotion is prohibited.
invariants.evidence: Trigger trg_ctb_promotion_enforcement fires BEFORE UPDATE on field_state. Tested: INSERT with PROMOTED, UPDATE to DRAFT raises 'CTB violation: cannot demote from PROMOTED to DRAFT'. Forward promotion (DRAFT → PROMOTED) allowed.

invariants.name: Append-Only Enforcement — check_log
invariants.description: check_log is immutable after INSERT. No UPDATE or DELETE allowed.
invariants.evidence: Two triggers: trg_check_log_no_update (BEFORE UPDATE), trg_check_log_no_delete (BEFORE DELETE). Both call deny_check_log_mutation() which raises exception. Tested: INSERT succeeds, UPDATE raises 'check_log is append-only: UPDATE operations are prohibited'.

invariants.name: No-Delete Enforcement — error_log
invariants.description: error_log allows INSERT and UPDATE (for resolved_at) but DELETE is prohibited.
invariants.evidence: Trigger trg_error_log_no_delete (BEFORE DELETE) calls deny_error_log_delete(). INSERT and UPDATE permitted (UPDATE needed for setting resolved_at). DELETE prohibited.

invariants.name: Referential Integrity
invariants.description: All child tables reference url_registry via foreign key.
invariants.evidence: field_state.url_id → url_registry(url_id), check_log.url_id → url_registry(url_id), error_log.url_id → url_registry(url_id). rate_state uses domain (TEXT) without FK — by design (rate limiting is per-domain, not per-URL).
